## 3.2.5 Track Capabilities (NEW v2.1)

Defines the specific equipment and features available on each maintenance track. Enables constraint-based scheduling that matches PM requirements to track capabilities.

```sql
-- Track capability definitions
CREATE TABLE track_capabilities (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    track_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tracks(id),
    capability track_capability NOT NULL,
    -- 'PIT', 'CRANE', 'LIFTING_JACKS', 'WHEEL_LATHE', 
    -- 'CATENARY_ISOLATION', 'ROOF_ACCESS', 'WASH', 'DROP_TABLE'
    
    -- Capacity limits for this capability
    capacity_limit JSONB,  -- e.g., {"max_axle_load_tonnes": 17, "max_lift_tonnes": 25}
    
    -- Availability
    is_operational BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
    maintenance_schedule TEXT,         -- e.g., "Unavailable Tuesdays 06:00-10:00"
    
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    
    UNIQUE(track_id, capability)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_track_cap_track ON track_capabilities(track_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_track_cap_type ON track_capabilities(capability) WHERE is_operational = TRUE;

-- PM type capability requirements

    notes TEXT,                         -- Explanation of why this capability is needed
    
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    
    UNIQUE(pm_type_id, capability)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_pm_cap_req_pm ON pm_capability_requirements(pm_type_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_pm_cap_req_cap ON pm_capability_requirements(capability);

## 3.2.6 PM Baseline Assumptions (NEW v2.1)

Handles cold start scenarios where PM history is incomplete during data migration. Tracks assumptions with confidence levels and flags records requiring manual review.

```sql
-- PM history baseline assumptions for cold start scenarios
CREATE TABLE pm_baseline_assumptions (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    train_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES trains(id),
    pm_type_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES pm_types(id),
    
    -- Assumption details
    assumption_type assumption_type NOT NULL,
    -- 'INFERRED_FROM_COMMISSIONING' - assume first PM at commissioning date + interval
    -- 'INFERRED_FROM_HIGHER_PM' - derived from C4/OH completion implies C1/C2/C3 done
    -- 'MANUAL_OVERRIDE' - operator entered value
    -- 'IMPORTED' - from legacy system with known quality
    -- 'NO_HISTORY' - no data available, using conservative estimate
    
    -- Assumed baseline values
    assumed_last_pm_date DATE,
    assumed_last_pm_mileage INTEGER,
    confidence_level confidence_level NOT NULL,  -- 'HIGH', 'MEDIUM', 'LOW', 'ESTIMATED'
    
    -- Inference source documentation
    inference_source TEXT,             -- Explanation of how assumption was derived
    inference_data JSONB,              -- Supporting data (e.g., higher PM dates)
    
    -- Review workflow
    requires_review BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    reviewed_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
    reviewed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    review_notes TEXT,
    
    -- When applied
    applied_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    applied_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
    
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    
    UNIQUE(train_id, pm_type_id)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_assumptions_train ON pm_baseline_assumptions(train_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_assumptions_review ON pm_baseline_assumptions(requires_review) 
    WHERE requires_review = TRUE;
CREATE INDEX idx_assumptions_confidence ON pm_baseline_assumptions(confidence_level)
    WHERE confidence_level IN ('LOW', 'ESTIMATED');

-- Example inference rules (implemented in application logic):
-- 1. If train commissioned 2020-01-01 and C1 interval is 6 months:
--    assumed_last_pm_date = 2020-01-01, confidence = 'LOW'
-- 2. If C4 completed 2024-06-15 and C4 satisfies C1/C2/C3:
--    For C1/C2/C3: assumed_last_pm_date = 2024-06-15, confidence = 'HIGH'
-- 3. If no data at all:
--    assumed_last_pm_date = commissioning_date, confidence = 'ESTIMATED', requires_review = TRUE
```

## 3.3 Mileage Tracking Tables

```sql
-- Meter events (odometer replacements, resets, swaps)
CREATE TABLE meter_events (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    train_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES trains(id),
    event_date DATE NOT NULL,
    event_type VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,  -- 'REPLACEMENT', 'RESET', 'CALIBRATION', 'SWAP'
    
    old_meter_serial VARCHAR(50),
    new_meter_serial VARCHAR(50),
    old_meter_reading INTEGER,
    new_meter_reading INTEGER,
    adjustment_km INTEGER,  -- Cumulative mileage adjustment to apply
    
    reason TEXT,
    approved_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
    approved_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    created_by UUID REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_meter_events_train ON meter_events(train_id, event_date DESC);

-- Daily mileage readings (TimescaleDB hypertable)
CREATE TABLE mileage_readings (
    train_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES trains(id),
    reading_date DATE NOT NULL,
    
    -- Raw and adjusted values
    raw_reading INTEGER NOT NULL,        -- Odometer value from CSV
    adjusted_reading INTEGER NOT NULL,   -- After meter event adjustments
    daily_km INTEGER,                    -- Calculated: today - yesterday
    
    -- Validation
    validation_status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'PENDING',  -- 'PENDING', 'VALID', 'ANOMALY', 'CORRECTED'
    anomaly_type VARCHAR(30),            -- 'NEGATIVE', 'SPIKE', 'MISSING', 'DUPLICATE'
    anomaly_notes TEXT,
    
    -- Source tracking
    source_file VARCHAR(255),
    meter_event_id UUID REFERENCES meter_events(id),
    
    ingested_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    
    PRIMARY KEY (train_id, reading_date)
);

-- Convert to TimescaleDB hypertable
SELECT create_hypertable('mileage_readings', 'reading_date', 
    chunk_time_interval => INTERVAL '7 days',
    if_not_exists => TRUE
);

-- Compression policy (compress data older than 30 days)
SELECT add_compression_policy('mileage_readings', INTERVAL '30 days');

-- Retention policy (keep 13 years for contract + buffer)
SELECT add_retention_policy('mileage_readings', INTERVAL '13 years');

-- Indexes for common queries
CREATE INDEX idx_mileage_train_date ON mileage_readings (train_id, reading_date DESC);
CREATE INDEX idx_mileage_validation ON mileage_readings (validation_status, reading_date DESC) 
    WHERE validation_status != 'VALID';

-- Continuous aggregate for dashboard queries
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW daily_fleet_mileage
WITH (timescaledb.continuous) AS
SELECT 
    time_bucket('1 day', reading_date) AS bucket,
    t.fleet_id,
    COUNT(*) as train_count,
    SUM(daily_km) as total_daily_km,
    AVG(daily_km) as avg_daily_km,
    MIN(daily_km) as min_daily_km,
    MAX(daily_km) as max_daily_km,
    STDDEV(daily_km) as stddev_daily_km
FROM mileage_readings mr
JOIN trains t ON mr.train_id = t.id
WHERE mr.validation_status = 'VALID'
GROUP BY bucket, t.fleet_id
WITH NO DATA;

SELECT add_continuous_aggregate_policy('daily_fleet_mileage',
    start_offset => INTERVAL '3 days',
    end_offset => INTERVAL '1 hour',
    schedule_interval => INTERVAL '1 hour'
);
```

## 3.4 Component Tracking Tables

```sql
-- Train components (bogies, motors, pantographs, etc.)
CREATE TABLE train_components (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    component_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,  -- 'BOGIE', 'TRACTION_MOTOR', 'PANTOGRAPH', 'BRAKE_UNIT'
    serial_number VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    manufacturer VARCHAR(100),
    model VARCHAR(100),
    
    -- Current installation
    current_train_id UUID REFERENCES trains(id),
    current_position VARCHAR(50),  -- e.g., 'CAR_1_BOGIE_A', 'CAR_3_MOTOR_L'
    installed_date DATE,
    installed_mileage_km INTEGER,  -- Train mileage at installation
    
    -- Component lifecycle
    commissioning_date DATE,
    component_mileage_km INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,  -- Cumulative mileage on this component
    last_overhaul_date DATE,
    last_overhaul_mileage_km INTEGER,
    
    -- Status
    status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'IN_SERVICE',  -- 'IN_SERVICE', 'SPARE', 'IN_OVERHAUL', 'CONDEMNED'
    condition_score INTEGER,  -- 1-100 condition rating
    
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_components_train ON train_components(current_train_id) WHERE status = 'IN_SERVICE';
CREATE INDEX idx_components_type ON train_components(component_type, status);

-- Component installation history
CREATE TABLE component_installations (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    component_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES train_components(id),
    train_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES trains(id),
    position VARCHAR(50),
    
    installed_date DATE NOT NULL,
    installed_train_mileage_km INTEGER NOT NULL,
    installed_component_mileage_km INTEGER NOT NULL,
    
    removed_date DATE,
    removed_train_mileage_km INTEGER,
    removed_component_mileage_km INTEGER,
    
    removal_reason VARCHAR(50),  -- 'SCHEDULED_OVERHAUL', 'FAILURE', 'SWAP', 'UPGRADE'
    work_order_id VARCHAR(50),   -- Link to Maximo
    
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_installations_component ON component_installations(component_id, installed_date DESC);
CREATE INDEX idx_installations_train ON component_installations(train_id, installed_date DESC);

-- Component-based mileage adjustments
-- When a component is swapped, PM thresholds follow the component, not the train
CREATE TABLE component_pm_tracking (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    component_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES train_components(id),
    pm_type_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES pm_types(id),
    
    last_pm_date DATE,
    last_pm_mileage_km INTEGER,
    next_pm_due_mileage_km INTEGER,
    next_pm_due_date DATE,
    
    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    
    UNIQUE(component_id, pm_type_id)
);

## 3.5 PM Management Tables

```sql
-- PM types (maintenance task definitions)
CREATE TABLE pm_types (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    fleet_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES fleets(id),
    pm_code VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,      -- 'C1', 'C2', 'C3', 'C4', 'OVERHAUL'
    pm_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    version INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
    
    -- Interval thresholds (whichever comes first)
    interval_km INTEGER,               -- Mileage-based trigger
    interval_months INTEGER,           -- Time-based trigger (industry standard)
    
    -- PM Hierarchy: which lower-level PMs does this PM satisfy?
    -- When a C4 is completed, it satisfies C1/C2/C3 requirements
    -- This resets their mileage counters from the C4 completion point
    -- Example: C4 row has satisfies_codes = ['C1', 'C2', 'C3']
    satisfies_codes VARCHAR(20)[],
    
    -- Resource requirements
    estimated_hours DECIMAL(6,2) NOT NULL,
    track_type track_type NOT NULL,
    min_track_days INTEGER DEFAULT 1,  -- How many days track is occupied
    
    -- Compliance window (tolerance for scheduling)
    early_tolerance_pct DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 10.0,   -- Can do 10% early
    late_tolerance_pct DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 10.0,    -- Can do 10% late
    
    -- Certification requirements
    required_certifications VARCHAR(50)[],
    
    -- NEW v2.1: PM type versioning for interval changes over contract life
    effective_from DATE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE,
    effective_to DATE,                              -- NULL = current version
    superseded_by UUID REFERENCES pm_types(id),    -- Link to newer version
    
    -- Canvas display
    display_color VARCHAR(7),
    display_priority INTEGER DEFAULT 50,
    
    active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    
    UNIQUE(fleet_id, pm_code, version)
);

-- Index for finding current PM type version
CREATE INDEX idx_pm_types_current ON pm_types(fleet_id, pm_code, effective_from DESC)
    WHERE effective_to IS NULL AND active = TRUE;

-- Example PM hierarchy data:
-- INSERT INTO pm_types (fleet_id, pm_code, pm_name, interval_km, interval_months, satisfies_codes, ...)
-- KS Fleet:
--   C1: interval_km=12500, interval_months=6,  satisfies_codes=NULL
--   C2: interval_km=50000, interval_months=24, satisfies_codes=['C1']
--   C3: interval_km=100000, interval_months=48, satisfies_codes=['C1','C2']
--   C4: interval_km=200000, interval_months=96, satisfies_codes=['C1','C2','C3']
--   OH: interval_km=800000, interval_months=NULL, satisfies_codes=['C1','C2','C3','C4']

-- PM material requirements (Bill of Materials)
CREATE TABLE pm_material_requirements (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    pm_type_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES pm_types(id),
    part_number VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    part_description TEXT,
    
    quantity_per_pm INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    criticality material_criticality NOT NULL DEFAULT 'BLOCKING',
    -- BLOCKING = cannot start PM without part
    -- DEFERRABLE = can start, must have within X days
    -- CONSUMABLE = nice-to-have, can substitute
    
    lead_time_days INTEGER DEFAULT 14,
    substitute_parts VARCHAR(50)[],    -- Alternative part numbers
    
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    
    UNIQUE(pm_type_id, part_number)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_pm_materials_type ON pm_material_requirements(pm_type_id);

-- PM schedule (planned and executed maintenance)
CREATE TABLE pm_schedule (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    train_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES trains(id),
    pm_type_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES pm_types(id),
    
    -- Scheduling
    target_date DATE NOT NULL,
    target_mileage_km INTEGER,
    status pm_status DEFAULT 'SCHEDULED',
    
    -- Compliance window (calculated from pm_types tolerances)
    constraint_start DATE NOT NULL,    -- Earliest allowed date
    constraint_end DATE NOT NULL,      -- Latest allowed date (statutory lock after this)
    
    -- Resource assignment
    assigned_depot_id UUID REFERENCES depots(id),
    assigned_track_id UUID REFERENCES tracks(id),
    assigned_hours DECIMAL(6,2),
    assigned_shift shift_type,
    
    -- Execution
    actual_start_date DATE,
    actual_end_date DATE,
    actual_hours DECIMAL(6,2),
    completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    completed_mileage_km INTEGER,
    
    -- Work order integration
    maximo_wo_id VARCHAR(50),
    
    -- Locking
    is_locked BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,   -- Cannot be moved by optimizer
    locked_reason VARCHAR(100),
    locked_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
    locked_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    
    -- Scenario support (NULL = production schedule)
    scenario_id UUID REFERENCES scenarios(id),
    
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    created_by UUID REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_pm_schedule_train ON pm_schedule(train_id, target_date);
CREATE INDEX idx_pm_schedule_date ON pm_schedule(target_date, status);
CREATE INDEX idx_pm_schedule_depot ON pm_schedule(assigned_depot_id, target_date) 
    WHERE status IN ('SCHEDULED', 'IN_PROGRESS');
CREATE INDEX idx_pm_schedule_scenario ON pm_schedule(scenario_id) WHERE scenario_id IS NOT NULL;
CREATE INDEX idx_pm_schedule_canvas ON pm_schedule(target_date, train_id)
    WHERE status IN ('SCHEDULED', 'IN_PROGRESS') AND scenario_id IS NULL;
```

## 3.6 Material Management Tables

```sql
-- Inventory positions (snapshot from ERP/Maximo)
CREATE TABLE inventory_positions (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    depot_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES depots(id),
    part_number VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    part_description TEXT,
    
    -- Quantities
    quantity_on_hand INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    quantity_reserved INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,  -- Soft + hard reservations
    quantity_on_order INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    quantity_available INTEGER GENERATED ALWAYS AS 
        (quantity_on_hand - quantity_reserved) STORED,
    
    -- Replenishment
    reorder_point INTEGER,
    reorder_quantity INTEGER,
    next_delivery_date DATE,
    next_delivery_quantity INTEGER,
    
    -- Cost
    unit_cost DECIMAL(12,2),
    currency VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'SGD',
    
    -- Sync tracking
    last_sync_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    source_system VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'MAXIMO',
    
    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    
    UNIQUE(depot_id, part_number)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_inventory_depot ON inventory_positions(depot_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_inventory_part ON inventory_positions(part_number);
CREATE INDEX idx_inventory_low_stock ON inventory_positions(depot_id, part_number) 
    WHERE quantity_available <= reorder_point;

-- Material reservations (link inventory to PM schedule)
CREATE TABLE material_reservations (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    pm_schedule_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES pm_schedule(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    inventory_position_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES inventory_positions(id),
    part_number VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    
    quantity_reserved INTEGER NOT NULL,
    reservation_type reservation_type DEFAULT 'SOFT',
    -- SOFT = tentative, can be released if PM moves
    -- HARD = committed, parts allocated
    
    reserved_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    reserved_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
    expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ,  -- SOFT reservations auto-expire
    
    -- Fulfillment
    fulfilled_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    fulfilled_quantity INTEGER,
    
    UNIQUE(pm_schedule_id, part_number)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_reservations_pm ON material_reservations(pm_schedule_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_reservations_inventory ON material_reservations(inventory_position_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_reservations_expiring ON material_reservations(expires_at) 
    WHERE reservation_type = 'SOFT' AND fulfilled_at IS NULL;

## 3.7 Man-hour Planning Tables

```sql
-- Man-hour capacity (resource availability by depot)
CREATE TABLE manhour_capacity (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    depot_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES depots(id),
    effective_from DATE NOT NULL,
    effective_to DATE,
    
    -- Base capacity per shift type
    day_shift_hours DECIMAL(8,2) NOT NULL,
    night_shift_hours DECIMAL(8,2) DEFAULT 0,
    weekend_hours DECIMAL(8,2) DEFAULT 0,
    
    -- Staff counts
    technicians_day INTEGER NOT NULL,
    technicians_night INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    specialists INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    
    -- Constraints
    max_overtime_pct DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 20.0,
    min_utilization_pct DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 70.0,
    target_utilization_pct DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 85.0,
    
    notes TEXT,
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    
    UNIQUE(depot_id, effective_from)
);

-- Man-hour projections (generated by leveling engine)
CREATE TABLE manhour_projections (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    projection_run_id UUID NOT NULL,
    depot_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES depots(id),
    
    period_start DATE NOT NULL,
    period_end DATE NOT NULL,
    granularity VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,  -- 'WEEKLY', 'MONTHLY'
    
    -- Required hours breakdown
    required_pm_hours DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    required_corrective_hours DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
    required_overhaul_hours DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
    required_total_hours DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    
    -- Available hours
    available_regular_hours DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    available_overtime_hours DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    available_total_hours DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    
    -- Computed metrics
    variance_hours DECIMAL(10,2) GENERATED ALWAYS AS 
        (available_total_hours - required_total_hours) STORED,
    utilization_pct DECIMAL(5,2) GENERATED ALWAYS AS 
        (CASE WHEN available_total_hours > 0 
              THEN (required_total_hours / available_total_hours * 100)
              ELSE 0 END) STORED,
    is_overloaded BOOLEAN GENERATED ALWAYS AS 
        (required_total_hours > available_total_hours) STORED,
    is_underutilized BOOLEAN GENERATED ALWAYS AS 
        (required_total_hours < available_total_hours * 0.7) STORED,
    
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_manhour_proj_depot ON manhour_projections(depot_id, period_start);
CREATE INDEX idx_manhour_proj_run ON manhour_projections(projection_run_id);

-- Man-hour adjustments (proposed changes to level workload)
CREATE TABLE manhour_adjustments (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    projection_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES manhour_projections(id),
    
    adjustment_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    -- 'ADD_OVERTIME', 'DEFER_PM', 'ADVANCE_PM', 'CROSS_DEPOT', 'ADD_CONTRACTOR'
    
    source_period_start DATE,
    source_period_end DATE,
    target_period_start DATE,
    target_period_end DATE,
    hours_adjusted DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    
    affected_pm_ids UUID[] DEFAULT '{}',
    affected_train_ids UUID[] DEFAULT '{}',
    
    -- Impact assessment
    cost_impact DECIMAL(12,2),
    risk_impact VARCHAR(20),  -- 'NONE', 'LOW', 'MEDIUM', 'HIGH'
    risk_description TEXT,
    
    -- Workflow
    status adjustment_status DEFAULT 'PROPOSED',
    proposed_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
    proposed_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    approved_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
    approved_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    rejection_reason TEXT,
    
    -- Explanation
    reason TEXT NOT NULL,
    
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_manhour_adj_projection ON manhour_adjustments(projection_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_manhour_adj_status ON manhour_adjustments(status) WHERE status = 'PROPOSED';
```

## 3.8 Baseline & Drift Tables

```sql
-- Plan baselines (immutable snapshots)
CREATE TABLE plan_baselines (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    description TEXT,
    version VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,  -- e.g., 'v3.2'

    -- Workflow
    status baseline_status DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
    created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    
    published_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
    published_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    
    superseded_by UUID REFERENCES plan_baselines(id),
    superseded_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    
    -- Metrics at baseline time
    fleet_count INTEGER,
    total_pm_scheduled INTEGER,
    total_manhours_projected DECIMAL(12,2)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_baselines_status ON plan_baselines(status);
CREATE INDEX idx_baselines_date ON plan_baselines(baseline_date DESC);

-- Baseline PM schedule snapshot
CREATE TABLE baseline_pm_schedule (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    baseline_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES plan_baselines(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    
    train_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES trains(id),
    pm_type_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES pm_types(id),
    projected_date DATE NOT NULL,
    projected_mileage_km INTEGER,
    
    assigned_depot_id UUID REFERENCES depots(id),
    assigned_hours DECIMAL(6,2),
    
    UNIQUE(baseline_id, train_id, pm_type_id, projected_date)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_baseline_pm_baseline ON baseline_pm_schedule(baseline_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_baseline_pm_train ON baseline_pm_schedule(train_id, projected_date);

-- Baseline mileage projections
CREATE TABLE baseline_mileage_projection (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    baseline_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES plan_baselines(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    
    train_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES trains(id),
    projection_date DATE NOT NULL,
    projected_cumulative_km INTEGER NOT NULL,
    daily_rate_km INTEGER,  -- Assumed daily accrual rate
    
    UNIQUE(baseline_id, train_id, projection_date)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_baseline_mileage ON baseline_mileage_projection(baseline_id, train_id);

-- Drift analysis results (generated by drift monitor)
CREATE TABLE drift_analysis (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    baseline_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES plan_baselines(id),
    analysis_date DATE NOT NULL,
    
    train_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES trains(id),
    
    -- Mileage drift
    baseline_projected_km INTEGER NOT NULL,
    actual_km INTEGER NOT NULL,
    mileage_drift_km INTEGER GENERATED ALWAYS AS (actual_km - baseline_projected_km) STORED,
    mileage_drift_pct DECIMAL(5,2),
    
    -- Schedule drift (days)
    avg_pm_drift_days DECIMAL(5,1),
    max_pm_drift_days INTEGER,
    
    -- Threshold breach
    requires_replan BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    replan_reason TEXT,
    
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    
    UNIQUE(baseline_id, train_id, analysis_date)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_drift_baseline ON drift_analysis(baseline_id, analysis_date);
CREATE INDEX idx_drift_replan ON drift_analysis(requires_replan, analysis_date) 
    WHERE requires_replan = TRUE;
```

-- Scenarios (what-if analysis containers)

-- Scenario deltas (event-sourced changes)
CREATE TABLE scenario_deltas (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    scenario_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES scenarios(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    sequence_num INTEGER NOT NULL,  -- Order of application
    
    delta_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    -- 'PM_MOVE', 'PM_ADD', 'PM_REMOVE', 'CAPACITY_CHANGE', 'TRAIN_STATUS_CHANGE'
    
    -- Reference to affected entity

    -- Change details (JSON)
    old_values JSONB,
    new_values JSONB,
    
    -- Explanation

    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    created_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
    
    UNIQUE(scenario_id, sequence_num)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_scenario_deltas_scenario ON scenario_deltas(scenario_id, sequence_num);

-- Scenario comparison results (materialized for performance)
CREATE TABLE scenario_comparisons (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    scenario_a_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES scenarios(id),
    scenario_b_id UUID REFERENCES scenarios(id),  -- NULL = compare to baseline
    baseline_id UUID REFERENCES plan_baselines(id),
    
    comparison_date DATE NOT NULL,
    
    -- Summary metrics
    pm_count_delta INTEGER,
    total_hours_delta DECIMAL(10,2),
    total_cost_delta DECIMAL(12,2),
    overloaded_weeks_delta INTEGER,
    
    -- Detailed differences (JSON)
    pm_differences JSONB,
    manhour_differences JSONB,
    
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE cost_baselines (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),

    depot_id UUID REFERENCES depots(id),
    
    budget_labor_hours DECIMAL(12,2),

    budget_total DECIMAL(14,2),
    
    -- Actuals (updated monthly)
    actual_labor_hours DECIMAL(12,2),
    actual_labor_cost DECIMAL(14,2),
    actual_material_cost DECIMAL(14,2),
    actual_total DECIMAL(14,2),
    
    variance_pct DECIMAL(5,2) GENERATED ALWAYS AS 
        (CASE WHEN budget_total > 0 
              THEN ((actual_total - budget_total) / budget_total * 100)
              ELSE 0 END) STORED,

    UNIQUE(fiscal_year, depot_id)

## 3.13 Canvas-Optimized Views

```sql
-- Strategic zoom level (yearly aggregates)
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW v_canvas_strategic AS
SELECT 
    t.id as train_id,
    t.train_number,
    t.fleet_id,
    date_trunc('year', ps.target_date) as year,
    COUNT(*) as pm_count,
    SUM(pt.estimated_hours) as total_hours,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ps.status = 'COMPLETED') as completed_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ps.is_locked) as locked_count,
    SUM(pt.estimated_hours) FILTER (WHERE ps.status = 'SCHEDULED') as pending_hours
FROM trains t
LEFT JOIN pm_schedule ps ON t.id = ps.train_id AND ps.scenario_id IS NULL
LEFT JOIN pm_types pt ON ps.pm_type_id = pt.id
WHERE t.active = TRUE
GROUP BY t.id, t.train_number, t.fleet_id, date_trunc('year', ps.target_date);

CREATE INDEX idx_v_canvas_strategic_train ON v_canvas_strategic(train_id, year);

-- Tactical zoom level (weekly aggregates with PM details)
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW v_canvas_tactical AS
SELECT 
    t.id as train_id,
    t.train_number,
    date_trunc('week', ps.target_date) as week_start,
    ps.id as pm_id,
    ps.target_date,
    ps.status,
    ps.constraint_start,
    ps.constraint_end,
    ps.is_locked,
    pt.pm_code,
    pt.estimated_hours,
    pt.display_color,
    tr.track_number,
    d.code as depot_code
FROM trains t
JOIN pm_schedule ps ON t.id = ps.train_id AND ps.scenario_id IS NULL
JOIN pm_types pt ON ps.pm_type_id = pt.id
LEFT JOIN tracks tr ON ps.assigned_track_id = tr.id
LEFT JOIN depots d ON ps.assigned_depot_id = d.id
WHERE t.active = TRUE
  AND ps.status IN ('SCHEDULED', 'IN_PROGRESS');

CREATE INDEX idx_v_canvas_tactical_train ON v_canvas_tactical(train_id, week_start);
CREATE INDEX idx_v_canvas_tactical_date ON v_canvas_tactical(target_date);

-- Man-hour canvas overlay
CREATE VIEW v_manhour_canvas AS
SELECT 
    mp.depot_id,
    d.code as depot_code,
    mp.period_start,
    mp.period_end,
    mp.required_total_hours,
    mp.available_total_hours,
    mp.variance_hours,
    mp.utilization_pct,
    mp.is_overloaded,
    mp.is_underutilized,
    COALESCE(adj.adjustment_count, 0) as pending_adjustments,
    COALESCE(adj.total_adjustment_hours, 0) as proposed_adjustment_hours
FROM manhour_projections mp
JOIN depots d ON mp.depot_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        projection_id,
        COUNT(*) as adjustment_count,
        SUM(hours_adjusted) as total_adjustment_hours
    FROM manhour_adjustments
    WHERE status = 'PROPOSED'
    GROUP BY projection_id
) adj ON mp.id = adj.projection_id
WHERE mp.projection_run_id = (
    SELECT projection_run_id 
    FROM manhour_projections 
    ORDER BY created_at DESC 
    LIMIT 1
);

-- Drift overlay (comparison to baseline)
CREATE VIEW v_drift_canvas AS
SELECT 
    da.train_id,
    t.train_number,
    da.baseline_id,
    pb.name as baseline_name,
    da.analysis_date,
    da.mileage_drift_km,
    da.mileage_drift_pct,
    da.avg_pm_drift_days,
    da.requires_replan,
    da.replan_reason,
    -- Color coding for canvas
    CASE 
        WHEN da.requires_replan THEN 'RED'
        WHEN ABS(da.mileage_drift_pct) > 3 THEN 'YELLOW'
        ELSE 'GREEN'
    END as drift_severity
FROM drift_analysis da
JOIN trains t ON da.train_id = t.id
JOIN plan_baselines pb ON da.baseline_id = pb.id
WHERE pb.status = 'PUBLISHED'
  AND da.analysis_date = (
      SELECT MAX(analysis_date) 
      FROM drift_analysis 
      WHERE baseline_id = da.baseline_id
  );

-- Refresh materialized views (scheduled job)
-- REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY v_canvas_strategic;
-- REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY v_canvas_tactical;
```

## 3.14 Database Maintenance

```sql
-- Automatic refresh of materialized views
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION refresh_canvas_views()
RETURNS void AS $$
BEGIN
    REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY v_canvas_strategic;
    REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY v_canvas_tactical;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

-- Schedule refresh every 15 minutes (use pg_cron or external scheduler)
-- SELECT cron.schedule('*/15 * * * *', 'SELECT refresh_canvas_views()');

-- Cleanup expired scenarios
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION cleanup_expired_scenarios()
RETURNS INTEGER AS $$
DECLARE
    deleted_count INTEGER;
BEGIN
    UPDATE scenarios 
    SET status = 'EXPIRED'
    WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' 
      AND expires_at < NOW();
    
    GET DIAGNOSTICS deleted_count = ROW_COUNT;
    RETURN deleted_count;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

-- Release expired soft reservations
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION release_expired_reservations()
RETURNS INTEGER AS $$
DECLARE
    released_count INTEGER;
BEGIN
    -- Update inventory positions
    UPDATE inventory_positions ip
    SET quantity_reserved = quantity_reserved - expired.total_qty
    FROM (
        SELECT inventory_position_id, SUM(quantity_reserved) as total_qty
        FROM material_reservations
        WHERE reservation_type = 'SOFT'
          AND expires_at < NOW()
          AND fulfilled_at IS NULL
        GROUP BY inventory_position_id
    ) expired
    WHERE ip.id = expired.inventory_position_id;
    
    -- Delete expired reservations
    DELETE FROM material_reservations
    WHERE reservation_type = 'SOFT'
      AND expires_at < NOW()
      AND fulfilled_at IS NULL;
    
    GET DIAGNOSTICS released_count = ROW_COUNT;
    RETURN released_count;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

-- Update train target mileage for fleet balancing
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_fleet_mileage_targets()
RETURNS void AS $$
BEGIN
    UPDATE trains t
    SET target_mileage_km = fleet_avg.avg_mileage
    FROM (
        SELECT fleet_id, AVG(current_mileage_km)::INTEGER as avg_mileage
        FROM trains
        WHERE active = TRUE
        GROUP BY fleet_id
    ) fleet_avg
    WHERE t.fleet_id = fleet_avg.fleet_id
      AND t.active = TRUE;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
```

   764тЖТ## 6.11 Performance Requirements
   765тЖТ
   766тЖТ| Metric | Target | Measurement |
   767тЖТ|--------|--------|-------------|
   768тЖТ| Initial load | <3s | Time to first meaningful paint |
   769тЖТ| Canvas render | 60 FPS | Frame rate during pan/zoom |
   770тЖТ| Data points | 500,000+ | Maximum renderable PM blocks |
   771тЖТ| Interaction response | <100ms | Time from click to visual feedback |
   772тЖТ| API response display | <500ms | Time from API response to UI update |
   773тЖТ| Memory usage | <1GB | Maximum heap size |
   774тЖТ
   775тЖТ### 6.11.1 Optimization Strategies
   776тЖТ
   777тЖТ```typescript
   778тЖТconst PERFORMANCE_OPTIMIZATIONS = {
   779тЖТ  // Data loading
   780тЖТ  virtualScrolling: true,           // Only render visible train rows
   781тЖТ  tileBasedLoading: true,           // Load canvas data in tiles
   782тЖТ  progressiveLoading: true,         // Load coarse data first, refine
   783тЖТ  
   784тЖТ  // Rendering
   785тЖТ  webWorkerCalculations: true,      // Offload heavy math to workers
   786тЖТ  gpuAcceleration: true,            // Use WebGL via deck.gl
   787тЖТ  memoizedFiltering: true,          // Cache filtered datasets
   788тЖТ  levelOfDetail: true,              // Reduce detail at low zoom
   789тЖТ  
   790тЖТ  // Caching
   791тЖТ  apiResponseCache: '5m',           // Cache API responses
   792тЖТ  canvasDataCache: '1m',            // Cache canvas tile data
   793тЖТ  userPreferencesCache: 'session',  // Cache user settings
   794тЖТ};
   795тЖТ```

## 6.8 Notification System

### 6.8.1 Toast Notifications

```typescript
type ToastType = 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'info';

interface Toast {
  id: string;
  type: ToastType;
  title: string;
  message?: string;
  action?: {
    label: string;
    onClick: () => void;
  };
  duration: number;  // ms, 0 = persistent
}

// Examples
const TOAST_EXAMPLES = {
  pmMoved: {
    type: 'success',
    title: 'PM Rescheduled',
    message: 'Train 1001 C2 moved from Feb 15 to Feb 20',
    duration: 5000
  },
  optimizerComplete: {
    type: 'info',
    title: 'Optimization Complete',
    message: '45 trains assigned, 3 unassigned',
    action: { label: 'View Results', onClick: () => {} },
    duration: 0  // Persistent until dismissed
  },
  constraintViolation: {
    type: 'error',
    title: 'Cannot Move PM',
    message: 'Track T1 is occupied by another PM on this date',
    duration: 8000
  },
  driftAlert: {
    type: 'warning',
    title: 'Drift Alert',
    message: '3 trains require replanning attention',
    action: { label: 'View Details', onClick: () => {} },
    duration: 0
  }
};
```

## 6.9 Accessibility Requirements

### 6.9.1 WCAG 2.1 AA Compliance

| Requirement | Implementation |
|-------------|----------------|
| Keyboard navigation | Full canvas navigation via arrow keys, Tab for controls |
| Screen reader | ARIA labels for all interactive elements |
| Color contrast | 4.5:1 minimum for text, 3:1 for large text |
| Focus indicators | Visible focus ring on all interactive elements |
| Alternative text | All icons have text alternatives |
| Reduced motion | Respect `prefers-reduced-motion` setting |

### 6.9.2 Keyboard Shortcuts

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `Tab` / `Shift+Tab` | Navigate between panels |
| `Arrow keys` | Pan canvas |
| `+` / `-` | Zoom in/out |
| `Home` | Go to today |
| `1-5` | Switch zoom levels |
| `Escape` | Cancel drag / Close dialog |
| `Enter` | Activate selected element |
| `Space` | Toggle selection |
| `?` | Show keyboard shortcuts |

---

### 6.10.1 Breakpoints

| Breakpoint | Width | Layout Changes |
|------------|-------|----------------|
| Desktop XL | ├втА░┬е1920px | Full layout with all panels |
| Desktop | ├втА░┬е1440px | Standard layout |
| Desktop SM | ├втА░┬е1280px | Collapsible side panels |

| Mobile | <1024px | Not supported (show message) |

## 6.11 Performance Requirements

| Metric | Target | Measurement |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| Initial load | <3s | Time to first meaningful paint |
| Canvas render | 60 FPS | Frame rate during pan/zoom |
| Data points | 500,000+ | Maximum renderable PM blocks |
| Interaction response | <100ms | Time from click to visual feedback |
| API response display | <500ms | Time from API response to UI update |
| Memory usage | <1GB | Maximum heap size |

### 6.11.1 Optimization Strategies

```typescript
const PERFORMANCE_OPTIMIZATIONS = {
  // Data loading
  virtualScrolling: true,           // Only render visible train rows
  tileBasedLoading: true,           // Load canvas data in tiles
  progressiveLoading: true,         // Load coarse data first, refine
  
  // Rendering
  webWorkerCalculations: true,      // Offload heavy math to workers
  gpuAcceleration: true,            // Use WebGL via deck.gl
  memoizedFiltering: true,          // Cache filtered datasets
  levelOfDetail: true,              // Reduce detail at low zoom
  
  // Caching
  apiResponseCache: '5m',           // Cache API responses
  canvasDataCache: '1m',            // Cache canvas tile data
  userPreferencesCache: 'session',  // Cache user settings
};
```

    58тЖТ
    59тЖТ## 4.2 Ingestion Service
    60тЖТ
    61тЖТ### 4.2.1 Purpose
    62тЖТ
    63тЖТProcess daily CSV files containing mileage data, validate records, handle meter events, and update the database.
    64тЖТ
    65тЖТ### 4.2.2 File Watcher
    66тЖТ
    67тЖТ```typescript
    68тЖТinterface FileWatcherConfig {
    69тЖТ  inboxPath: string;           // /data/inbox
    70тЖТ  processedPath: string;       // /data/processed
    71тЖТ  quarantinePath: string;      // /data/quarantine
    72тЖТ  expectedFilePattern: RegExp; // /^mileage_\d{8}\.csv$/
    73тЖТ  maxFileSizeBytes: number;    // 10MB
    74тЖТ  alertThresholdHours: number; // 2
    75тЖТ}
    76тЖТ
    77тЖТclass FileWatcherService {
    78тЖТ  private watcher: FSWatcher;
    79тЖТ  private lastFileReceivedAt: Date | null = null;
    80тЖТ  
    81тЖТ  async start(): Promise<void> {
    82тЖТ    this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.config.inboxPath, {
    83тЖТ      persistent: true,
    84тЖТ      awaitWriteFinish: { stabilityThreshold: 2000, pollInterval: 500 }
    85тЖТ    });
    86тЖТ    
    87тЖТ    this.watcher.on('add', async (filePath) => {
    88тЖТ      this.lastFileReceivedAt = new Date();
    89тЖТ      await this.processFile(filePath);
    90тЖТ    });
    91тЖТ    
    92тЖТ    // Health check interval
    93тЖТ    setInterval(() => this.checkFileArrivalHealth(), 30 * 60 * 1000);
    94тЖТ  }
    95тЖТ  
    96тЖТ  private async processFile(filePath: string): Promise<void> {
    97тЖТ    const filename = path.basename(filePath);
    98тЖТ    const jobId = crypto.randomUUID();
    99тЖТ    
   100тЖТ    try {
   101тЖТ      // Validate file
   102тЖТ      await this.validateFile(filePath);
   103тЖТ      
   104тЖТ      // Queue for processing
   105тЖТ      await this.jobQueue.add('ingestion', {
   106тЖТ        jobId,
   107тЖТ        filePath,
   108тЖТ        filename,
   109тЖТ        receivedAt: new Date().toISOString()
   110тЖТ      }, {
   111тЖТ        attempts: 3,
   112тЖТ        backoff: { type: 'exponential', delay: 5000 }
   113тЖТ      });
   114тЖТ      
   115тЖТ      this.logger.info({ jobId, filename }, 'File queued for ingestion');
   116тЖТ      
   117тЖТ    } catch (error) {
   118тЖТ      // Move to quarantine
   119тЖТ      const quarantinePath = path.join(
   120тЖТ        this.config.quarantinePath, 
   121тЖТ        `${Date.now()}_${filename}`
   122тЖТ      );
   123тЖТ      await fs.rename(filePath, quarantinePath);
   124тЖТ      
   125тЖТ      this.logger.error({ filename, error }, 'File quarantined');
   126тЖТ      
   127тЖТ      await this.alertService.send({
   128тЖТ        type: 'FILE_VALIDATION_FAILED',
   129тЖТ        severity: 'WARNING',
   130тЖТ        message: `File ${filename} failed validation: ${error.message}`,
   131тЖТ        filePath: quarantinePath
   132тЖТ      });
   133тЖТ    }
   134тЖТ  }
   135тЖТ  
   136тЖТ  private async validateFile(filePath: string): Promise<void> {
   137тЖТ    const stats = await fs.stat(filePath);
   138тЖТ    
   139тЖТ    // Size check
   140тЖТ    if (stats.size > this.config.maxFileSizeBytes) {
   141тЖТ      throw new Error(`File exceeds maximum size: ${stats.size} bytes`);
   142тЖТ    }
   143тЖТ    
   144тЖТ    // Format check
   145тЖТ    const filename = path.basename(filePath);
   146тЖТ    if (!this.config.expectedFilePattern.test(filename)) {
   147тЖТ      throw new Error(`Filename does not match expected pattern: ${filename}`);
   148тЖТ    }
   149тЖТ    
   150тЖТ    // Content check (first 10 lines)
   151тЖТ    const sample = await this.readFirstLines(filePath, 10);
   152тЖТ    await this.validateCSVStructure(sample);
   153тЖТ  }
   154тЖТ  
   155тЖТ  private async checkFileArrivalHealth(): Promise<void> {
   156тЖТ    if (!this.lastFileReceivedAt) return;
   157тЖТ    
   158тЖТ    const hoursSinceLastFile = 
   159тЖТ      (Date.now() - this.lastFileReceivedAt.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
   160тЖТ    
   161тЖТ    if (hoursSinceLastFile > this.config.alertThresholdHours) {
   162тЖТ      await this.alertService.send({
   163тЖТ        type: 'FILE_ARRIVAL_DELAYED',
   164тЖТ        severity: 'WARNING',
   165тЖТ        message: `No mileage files received in ${hoursSinceLastFile.toFixed(1)} hours`,
   166тЖТ        lastFileAt: this.lastFileReceivedAt.toISOString(),
   167тЖТ        expectedInterval: `${this.config.alertThresholdHours} hours`
   168тЖТ      });
   169тЖТ    }
   170тЖТ  }
   171тЖТ}
   172тЖТ```
   173тЖТ
   174тЖТ### 4.2.3 Ingestion Worker
   175тЖТ
   176тЖТ```typescript
   177тЖТinterface MileageRecord {
   178тЖТ  trainNumber: string;
   179тЖТ  readingDate: string;  // YYYY-MM-DD
   180тЖТ  odometerValue: number;
   181тЖТ  source?: string;
   182тЖТ}
   183тЖТ
   184тЖТinterface IngestionResult {
   185тЖТ  jobId: string;
   186тЖТ  filename: string;
   187тЖТ  totalRecords: number;
   188тЖТ  validRecords: number;
   189тЖТ  invalidRecords: number;
   190тЖТ  anomalies: AnomalyRecord[];
   191тЖТ  meterEvents: MeterEventRecord[];
   192тЖТ  processingTimeMs: number;
   193тЖТ}
   194тЖТ
   195тЖТclass IngestionWorker {
   196тЖТ  async process(job: Job<IngestionJobData>): Promise<IngestionResult> {
   197тЖТ    const startTime = Date.now();
   198тЖТ    const { jobId, filePath, filename } = job.data;
   199тЖТ    
   200тЖТ    const result: IngestionResult = {
   201тЖТ      jobId,
   202тЖТ      filename,
   203тЖТ      totalRecords: 0,
   204тЖТ      validRecords: 0,
   205тЖТ      invalidRecords: 0,
   206тЖТ      anomalies: [],
   207тЖТ      meterEvents: [],
   208тЖТ      processingTimeMs: 0
   209тЖТ    };
   210тЖТ    
   211тЖТ    // Parse CSV
   212тЖТ    const records = await this.parseCSV(filePath);
   213тЖТ    result.totalRecords = records.length;
   214тЖТ    
   215тЖТ    // Process in batches
   216тЖТ    const batches = this.chunk(records, 100);
   217тЖТ    
   218тЖТ    for (const batch of batches) {
   219тЖТ      await this.db.transaction(async (tx) => {
   220тЖТ        for (const record of batch) {
   221тЖТ          try {
   222тЖТ            await this.processRecord(tx, record, result);
   223тЖТ            result.validRecords++;
   224тЖТ          } catch (error) {
   225тЖТ            result.invalidRecords++;
   226тЖТ            this.logger.warn({ record, error }, 'Record processing failed');
   227тЖТ          }
   228тЖТ        }
   229тЖТ      });
   230тЖТ    }
   231тЖТ    
   232тЖТ    // Move file to processed
   233тЖТ    const processedPath = path.join(
   234тЖТ      this.config.processedPath,
   235тЖТ      `${Date.now()}_${filename}`
   236тЖТ    );
   237тЖТ    await fs.rename(filePath, processedPath);
   238тЖТ    
   239тЖТ    // Update train current mileage
   240тЖТ    await this.updateTrainMileage(records);
   241тЖТ    
   242тЖТ    // Trigger downstream processing
   243тЖТ    await this.triggerDriftCheck();
   244тЖТ    
   245тЖТ    result.processingTimeMs = Date.now() - startTime;
   246тЖТ    
   247тЖТ    return result;
   248тЖТ  }
   249тЖТ  
   250тЖТ  private async processRecord(
   251тЖТ    tx: Transaction,
   252тЖТ    record: MileageRecord,
   253тЖТ    result: IngestionResult
   254тЖТ  ): Promise<void> {
   255тЖТ    // Find train
   256тЖТ    const train = await tx.query.trains.findFirst({
   257тЖТ      where: eq(trains.trainNumber, record.trainNumber)
   258тЖТ    });
   259тЖТ    
   260тЖТ    if (!train) {
   261тЖТ      throw new Error(`Unknown train: ${record.trainNumber}`);
   262тЖТ    }
   263тЖТ    
   264тЖТ    // Get previous reading
   265тЖТ    const previousReading = await tx.query.mileageReadings.findFirst({
   266тЖТ      where: and(
   267тЖТ        eq(mileageReadings.trainId, train.id),
   268тЖТ        lt(mileageReadings.readingDate, record.readingDate)
   269тЖТ      ),
   270тЖТ      orderBy: desc(mileageReadings.readingDate)
   271тЖТ    });
   272тЖТ    
   273тЖТ    // Calculate adjusted value (handle meter events)
   274тЖТ    const adjustment = await this.getMeterAdjustment(tx, train.id, record.readingDate);
   275тЖТ    const adjustedReading = record.odometerValue + adjustment;
   276тЖТ    
   277тЖТ    // Calculate daily km
   278тЖТ    let dailyKm: number | null = null;
   279тЖТ    let anomalyType: string | null = null;
   280тЖТ    
   281тЖТ    if (previousReading) {
   282тЖТ      dailyKm = adjustedReading - previousReading.adjustedReading;
   283тЖТ      
   284тЖТ      // Anomaly detection
   285тЖТ      if (dailyKm < 0) {
   286тЖТ        anomalyType = 'NEGATIVE';
   287тЖТ        result.anomalies.push({
   288тЖТ          trainNumber: record.trainNumber,
   289тЖТ          date: record.readingDate,
   290тЖТ          type: 'NEGATIVE',
   291тЖТ          value: dailyKm,
   292тЖТ          message: `Negative daily mileage: ${dailyKm} km`
   293тЖТ        });
   294тЖТ      } else if (dailyKm > 1000) {  // Spike threshold
   295тЖТ        anomalyType = 'SPIKE';
   296тЖТ        result.anomalies.push({
   297тЖТ          trainNumber: record.trainNumber,
   298тЖТ          date: record.readingDate,
   299тЖТ          type: 'SPIKE',
   300тЖТ          value: dailyKm,
   301тЖТ          message: `Unusually high daily mileage: ${dailyKm} km`
   302тЖТ        });
   303тЖТ      }
   304тЖТ    }
   305тЖТ    
   306тЖТ    // Insert or update reading
   307тЖТ    await tx.insert(mileageReadings)
   308тЖТ      .values({
   309тЖТ        trainId: train.id,
   310тЖТ        readingDate: record.readingDate,
   311тЖТ        rawReading: record.odometerValue,
   312тЖТ        adjustedReading,
   313тЖТ        dailyKm,
   314тЖТ        validationStatus: anomalyType ? 'ANOMALY' : 'VALID',
   315тЖТ        anomalyType,
   316тЖТ        sourceFile: result.filename
   317тЖТ      })
   318тЖТ      .onConflictDoUpdate({
   319тЖТ        target: [mileageReadings.trainId, mileageReadings.readingDate],
   320тЖТ        set: {
   321тЖТ          rawReading: record.odometerValue,
   322тЖТ          adjustedReading,
   323тЖТ          dailyKm,
   324тЖТ          validationStatus: anomalyType ? 'ANOMALY' : 'VALID',
   325тЖТ          anomalyType,
   326тЖТ          sourceFile: result.filename
   327тЖТ        }
   328тЖТ      });
   329тЖТ  }
   330тЖТ  
   331тЖТ  private async getMeterAdjustment(
   332тЖТ    tx: Transaction,
   333тЖТ    trainId: string,
   334тЖТ    asOfDate: string
   335тЖТ  ): Promise<number> {
   336тЖТ    // Sum all meter event adjustments up to this date
   337тЖТ    const events = await tx.query.meterEvents.findMany({
   338тЖТ      where: and(
   339тЖТ        eq(meterEvents.trainId, trainId),
   340тЖТ        lte(meterEvents.eventDate, asOfDate)
   341тЖТ      )
   342тЖТ    });
   343тЖТ    
   344тЖТ    return events.reduce((sum, e) => sum + (e.adjustmentKm || 0), 0);
   345тЖТ  }
   346тЖТ  
   347тЖТ  private async updateTrainMileage(records: MileageRecord[]): Promise<void> {
   348тЖТ    // Group by train, find latest reading
   349тЖТ    const latestByTrain = new Map<string, MileageRecord>();
   350тЖТ    
   351тЖТ    for (const record of records) {
   352тЖТ      const existing = latestByTrain.get(record.trainNumber);
   353тЖТ      if (!existing || record.readingDate > existing.readingDate) {
   354тЖТ        latestByTrain.set(record.trainNumber, record);
   355тЖТ      }
   356тЖТ    }
   357тЖТ    
   358тЖТ    // Update train current_mileage
   359тЖТ    for (const [trainNumber, record] of latestByTrain) {
   360тЖТ      await this.db.update(trains)
   361тЖТ        .set({ 
   362тЖТ          currentMileageKm: record.odometerValue,
   363тЖТ          updatedAt: new Date()
   364тЖТ        })
   365тЖТ        .where(eq(trains.trainNumber, trainNumber));
   366тЖТ    }
   367тЖТ    
   368тЖТ    // Update fleet mileage targets
   369тЖТ    await this.db.execute(sql`SELECT update_fleet_mileage_targets()`);
   370тЖТ  }
   371тЖТ}
   372тЖТ```
   373тЖТ
   374тЖТ---
   375тЖТ
   376тЖТ## 4.2.5 Unavailability Service (NEW v2.1)
   377тЖТ
   378тЖТ### 4.2.5.1 Purpose
   379тЖТ
   380тЖТTrack trains that are unavailable due to corrective maintenance, incidents, or other blocking factors. This service is **critical** for schedule validity - without it, the optimizer can schedule PMs for trains that are grounded for weeks.
   381тЖТ
   382тЖТ### 4.2.5.2 Implementation
   383тЖТ
   384тЖТ```typescript
   385тЖТinterface UnavailabilityEvent {
   386тЖТ  id: string;
   387тЖТ  trainId: string;
   388тЖТ  eventType: 'CORRECTIVE' | 'INCIDENT' | 'COLLISION' | 'VANDALISM' | 'EXTERNAL' | 'PLANNED_OUTAGE';
   389тЖТ  status: 'ACTIVE' | 'RESOLVED';
   390тЖТ  restrictionLevel: 'RESTRICTED' | 'GROUNDED';
   391тЖТ  
   392тЖТ  reportedAt: Date;
   393тЖТ  estimatedRepairHours?: number;
   394тЖТ  estimatedReturnDate?: Date;
   395тЖТ  actualReturnDate?: Date;
   396тЖТ  
   397тЖТ  sourceSystem: 'MAXIMO' | 'OCC' | 'MANUAL';
   398тЖТ  externalReference?: string;   // Maximo WO number
   399тЖТ  externalStatus?: string;      // Maximo status
   400тЖТ  
   401тЖТ  description?: string;
   402тЖТ  failureCode?: string;
   403тЖТ  affectedSystem?: string;
   404тЖТ  
   405тЖТ  blocksPmScheduling: boolean;
   406тЖТ  blocksRunAssignment: boolean;
   407тЖТ}
   408тЖТ
   409тЖТinterface CreateUnavailabilityInput {
   410тЖТ  trainId: string;
   411тЖТ  eventType: UnavailabilityEvent['eventType'];
   412тЖТ  restrictionLevel: UnavailabilityEvent['restrictionLevel'];
   413тЖТ  estimatedReturnDate?: Date;
   414тЖТ  estimatedRepairHours?: number;
   415тЖТ  sourceSystem: UnavailabilityEvent['sourceSystem'];
   416тЖТ  externalReference?: string;
   417тЖТ  description?: string;
   418тЖТ  affectedSystem?: string;
   419тЖТ}
   420тЖТ
   421тЖТclass UnavailabilityService {
   422тЖТ  constructor(
   423тЖТ    private db: Database,
   424тЖТ    private alertService: AlertService,
   425тЖТ    private auditService: AuditService
   426тЖТ  ) {}
   427тЖТ  
   428тЖТ  /**
   429тЖТ   * Create a new unavailability event (e.g., from Maximo webhook)
   430тЖТ   */
   431тЖТ  async createEvent(input: CreateUnavailabilityInput, userId?: string): Promise<UnavailabilityEvent> {
   432тЖТ    const event = await this.db.transaction(async (tx) => {
   433тЖТ      // 1. Create the unavailability event
   434тЖТ      const [newEvent] = await tx
   435тЖТ        .insert(unavailabilityEvents)
   436тЖТ        .values({
   437тЖТ          ...input,
   438тЖТ          status: 'ACTIVE',
   439тЖТ          reportedAt: new Date(),
   440тЖТ          blocksPmScheduling: true,
   441тЖТ          blocksRunAssignment: input.restrictionLevel === 'GROUNDED',
   442тЖТ        })
   443тЖТ        .returning();
   444тЖТ      
   445тЖТ      // 2. Update train fitness status (trigger handles this, but we can be explicit)
   446тЖТ      await tx
   447тЖТ        .update(trains)
   448тЖТ        .set({
   449тЖТ          fitnessStatus: input.restrictionLevel,
   450тЖТ          fitnessNotes: input.description || `Unavailability: ${input.eventType}`,
   451тЖТ          updatedAt: new Date()
   452тЖТ        })
   453тЖТ        .where(eq(trains.id, input.trainId));
   454тЖТ      
   455тЖТ      // 3. Check for conflicts with scheduled PMs
   456тЖТ      const conflicts = await this.checkPMConflicts(tx, input.trainId, input.estimatedReturnDate);
   457тЖТ      
   458тЖТ      return { event: newEvent, conflicts };
   459тЖТ    });
   460тЖТ    
   461тЖТ    // Alert if PM conflicts exist
   462тЖТ    if (event.conflicts.length > 0) {
   463тЖТ      await this.alertService.send({
   464тЖТ        type: 'UNAVAILABILITY_PM_CONFLICT',
   465тЖТ        severity: 'WARNING',
   466тЖТ        message: `Train ${event.event.trainId} unavailable - ${event.conflicts.length} scheduled PMs may be affected`,
   467тЖТ        data: {
   468тЖТ          trainId: event.event.trainId,
   469тЖТ          eventId: event.event.id,
   470тЖТ          conflictingPMs: event.conflicts.map(pm => ({
   471тЖТ            pmId: pm.id,
   472тЖТ            pmType: pm.pmTypeCode,
   473тЖТ            targetDate: pm.targetDate
   474тЖТ          }))
   475тЖТ        }
   476тЖТ      });
   477тЖТ    }
   478тЖТ    
   479тЖТ    // Audit log
   480тЖТ    await this.auditService.log({
   481тЖТ      entityType: 'unavailability_event',
   482тЖТ      entityId: event.event.id,
   483тЖТ      action: 'CREATE',
   484тЖТ      userId,
   485тЖТ      newValues: event.event
   486тЖТ    });
   487тЖТ    
   488тЖТ    return event.event;
   489тЖТ  }
   490тЖТ  
   491тЖТ  /**
   492тЖТ   * Resolve an unavailability event (train returns to service)
   493тЖТ   */
   494тЖТ  async resolveEvent(
   495тЖТ    eventId: string, 
   496тЖТ    actualReturnDate: Date, 
   497тЖТ    userId: string,
   498тЖТ    notes?: string
   499тЖТ  ): Promise<void> {
   500тЖТ    await this.db.transaction(async (tx) => {
   501тЖТ      const [event] = await tx
   502тЖТ        .select()
   503тЖТ        .from(unavailabilityEvents)
   504тЖТ        .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.id, eventId));
   505тЖТ      
   506тЖТ      if (!event) {
   507тЖТ        throw new NotFoundError(`Unavailability event ${eventId} not found`);
   508тЖТ      }
   509тЖТ      
   510тЖТ      if (event.status === 'RESOLVED') {
   511тЖТ        throw new ConflictError('Event already resolved');
   512тЖТ      }
   513тЖТ      
   514тЖТ      // Update the event
   515тЖТ      await tx
   516тЖТ        .update(unavailabilityEvents)
   517тЖТ        .set({
   518тЖТ          status: 'RESOLVED',
   519тЖТ          actualReturnDate,
   520тЖТ          resolvedAt: new Date(),
   521тЖТ          resolvedBy: userId,
   522тЖТ          resolutionNotes: notes,
   523тЖТ          updatedAt: new Date()
   524тЖТ        })
   525тЖТ        .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.id, eventId));
   526тЖТ      
   527тЖТ      // Check if there are other active unavailability events for this train
   528тЖТ      const otherActive = await tx
   529тЖТ        .select({ count: count() })
   530тЖТ        .from(unavailabilityEvents)
   531тЖТ        .where(and(
   532тЖТ          eq(unavailabilityEvents.trainId, event.trainId),
   533тЖТ          eq(unavailabilityEvents.status, 'ACTIVE'),
   534тЖТ          ne(unavailabilityEvents.id, eventId)
   535тЖТ        ));
   536тЖТ      
   537тЖТ      // If no other active events, restore train to FIT
   538тЖТ      if (otherActive[0].count === 0) {
   539тЖТ        await tx
   540тЖТ          .update(trains)
   541тЖТ          .set({
   542тЖТ            fitnessStatus: 'FIT',
   543тЖТ            fitnessNotes: null,
   544тЖТ            updatedAt: new Date()
   545тЖТ          })
   546тЖТ          .where(eq(trains.id, event.trainId));
   547тЖТ      }
   548тЖТ    });
   549тЖТ    
   550тЖТ    await this.auditService.log({
   551тЖТ      entityType: 'unavailability_event',
   552тЖТ      entityId: eventId,
   553тЖТ      action: 'RESOLVE',
   554тЖТ      userId,
   555тЖТ      newValues: { status: 'RESOLVED', actualReturnDate }
   556тЖТ    });
   557тЖТ  }
   558тЖТ  
   559тЖТ  /**
   560тЖТ   * Get all active unavailability events (for optimizer input)
   561тЖТ   */
   562тЖТ  async getActiveUnavailability(depotId?: string): Promise<UnavailabilityEvent[]> {
   563тЖТ    let query = this.db
   564тЖТ      .select({
   565тЖТ        event: unavailabilityEvents,
   566тЖТ        train: {
   567тЖТ          trainNumber: trains.trainNumber,
   568тЖТ          fleetId: trains.fleetId,
   569тЖТ          currentDepotId: trains.currentDepotId
   570тЖТ        }
   571тЖТ      })
   572тЖТ      .from(unavailabilityEvents)
   573тЖТ      .innerJoin(trains, eq(unavailabilityEvents.trainId, trains.id))
   574тЖТ      .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.status, 'ACTIVE'));
   575тЖТ    
   576тЖТ    if (depotId) {
   577тЖТ      query = query.where(eq(trains.currentDepotId, depotId));
   578тЖТ    }
   579тЖТ    
   580тЖТ    const results = await query;
   581тЖТ    return results.map(r => ({
   582тЖТ      ...r.event,
   583тЖТ      trainNumber: r.train.trainNumber,
   584тЖТ      fleetId: r.train.fleetId
   585тЖТ    }));
   586тЖТ  }
   587тЖТ  
   588тЖТ  /**
   589тЖТ   * Check if a specific train is available on a specific date
   590тЖТ   */
   591тЖТ  async isTrainAvailable(trainId: string, targetDate: Date): Promise<{
   592тЖТ    available: boolean;
   593тЖТ    blockingEvent?: UnavailabilityEvent;
   594тЖТ  }> {
   595тЖТ    const activeEvents = await this.db
   596тЖТ      .select()
   597тЖТ      .from(unavailabilityEvents)
   598тЖТ      .where(and(
   599тЖТ        eq(unavailabilityEvents.trainId, trainId),
   600тЖТ        eq(unavailabilityEvents.status, 'ACTIVE'),
   601тЖТ        or(
   602тЖТ          isNull(unavailabilityEvents.estimatedReturnDate),
   603тЖТ          gte(unavailabilityEvents.estimatedReturnDate, targetDate)
   604тЖТ        )
   605тЖТ      ))
   606тЖТ      .limit(1);
   607тЖТ    
   608тЖТ    if (activeEvents.length > 0) {
   609тЖТ      return { available: false, blockingEvent: activeEvents[0] };
   610тЖТ    }
   611тЖТ    
   612тЖТ    return { available: true };
   613тЖТ  }
   614тЖТ  
   615тЖТ  /**
   616тЖТ   * Process Maximo webhook for work order status change
   617тЖТ   */
   618тЖТ  async processMaximoWebhook(payload: MaximoWorkOrderWebhook): Promise<void> {
   619тЖТ    // Map Maximo work types to our event types
   620тЖТ    const eventTypeMap: Record<string, UnavailabilityEvent['eventType']> = {
   621тЖТ      'CM': 'CORRECTIVE',
   622тЖТ      'EM': 'CORRECTIVE',  // Emergency maintenance
   623тЖТ      'IN': 'INCIDENT'
   624тЖТ    };
   625тЖТ    
   626тЖТ    if (!eventTypeMap[payload.worktype]) {
   627тЖТ      // Not a corrective maintenance type, ignore
   628тЖТ      return;
   629тЖТ    }
   630тЖТ    
   631тЖТ    // Check if we already have an event for this WO
   632тЖТ    const existing = await this.db
   633тЖТ      .select()
   634тЖТ      .from(unavailabilityEvents)
   635тЖТ      .where(and(
   636тЖТ        eq(unavailabilityEvents.sourceSystem, 'MAXIMO'),
   637тЖТ        eq(unavailabilityEvents.externalReference, payload.wonum)
   638тЖТ      ))
   639тЖТ      .limit(1);
   640тЖТ    
   641тЖТ    if (existing.length > 0) {
   642тЖТ      // Update existing event based on Maximo status
   643тЖТ      await this.updateFromMaximo(existing[0], payload);
   644тЖТ    } else if (payload.status === 'WAPPR' || payload.status === 'INPRG') {
   645тЖТ      // Create new unavailability event
   646тЖТ      const train = await this.findTrainByAssetnum(payload.assetnum);
   647тЖТ      if (!train) {
   648тЖТ        this.logger.warn({ assetnum: payload.assetnum }, 'Unknown asset in Maximo webhook');
   649тЖТ        return;
   650тЖТ      }
   651тЖТ      
   652тЖТ      await this.createEvent({
   653тЖТ        trainId: train.id,
   654тЖТ        eventType: eventTypeMap[payload.worktype],
   655тЖТ        restrictionLevel: 'GROUNDED',  // Default to grounded for CM
   656тЖТ        estimatedReturnDate: payload.schedfinish ? new Date(payload.schedfinish) : undefined,
   657тЖТ        sourceSystem: 'MAXIMO',
   658тЖТ        externalReference: payload.wonum,
   659тЖТ        description: payload.description
   660тЖТ      });
   661тЖТ    }
   662тЖТ  }
   663тЖТ  
   664тЖТ  private async updateFromMaximo(
   665тЖТ    event: UnavailabilityEvent, 
   666тЖТ    payload: MaximoWorkOrderWebhook
   667тЖТ  ): Promise<void> {
   668тЖТ    const maximoStatusMap: Record<string, 'ACTIVE' | 'RESOLVED'> = {
   669тЖТ      'WAPPR': 'ACTIVE',
   670тЖТ      'APPR': 'ACTIVE',
   671тЖТ      'INPRG': 'ACTIVE',
   672тЖТ      'COMP': 'RESOLVED',
   673тЖТ      'CLOSE': 'RESOLVED',
   674тЖТ      'CAN': 'RESOLVED'
   675тЖТ    };
   676тЖТ    
   677тЖТ    const newStatus = maximoStatusMap[payload.status] || 'ACTIVE';
   678тЖТ    
   679тЖТ    if (newStatus === 'RESOLVED' && event.status === 'ACTIVE') {
   680тЖТ      await this.resolveEvent(
   681тЖТ        event.id, 
   682тЖТ        new Date(), 
   683тЖТ        'SYSTEM_MAXIMO',
   684тЖТ        `Resolved via Maximo status: ${payload.status}`
   685тЖТ      );
   686тЖТ    } else {
   687тЖТ      // Update estimated return date if changed
   688тЖТ      await this.db
   689тЖТ        .update(unavailabilityEvents)
   690тЖТ        .set({
   691тЖТ          externalStatus: payload.status,
   692тЖТ          estimatedReturnDate: payload.schedfinish ? new Date(payload.schedfinish) : undefined,
   693тЖТ          updatedAt: new Date()
   694тЖТ        })
   695тЖТ        .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.id, event.id));
   696тЖТ    }
   697тЖТ  }
   698тЖТ  
   699тЖТ  private async checkPMConflicts(
   700тЖТ    tx: Transaction,
   701тЖТ    trainId: string,
   702тЖТ    estimatedReturnDate?: Date
   703тЖТ  ): Promise<PMSchedule[]> {
   704тЖТ    const endDate = estimatedReturnDate || addDays(new Date(), 90); // Default 90 days
   705тЖТ    
   706тЖТ    return tx
   707тЖТ      .select()
   708тЖТ      .from(pmSchedule)
   709тЖТ      .where(and(
   710тЖТ        eq(pmSchedule.trainId, trainId),
   711тЖТ        eq(pmSchedule.status, 'SCHEDULED'),
   712тЖТ        lte(pmSchedule.targetDate, endDate),
   713тЖТ        isNull(pmSchedule.scenarioId)
   714тЖТ      ));
   715тЖТ  }
   716тЖТ}
   717тЖТ```
   718тЖТ
   719тЖТ---
   720тЖТ
   721тЖТ## 4.2.6 Service Demand Service (NEW v2.1)
   722тЖТ
   723тЖТ### 4.2.6.1 Purpose
   724тЖТ
   725тЖТManage fleet availability requirements by day type. This is a **hard constraint** for the optimizer - it cannot approve maintenance schedules that would violate minimum train availability.
   726тЖТ
   727тЖТ### 4.2.6.2 Implementation
   728тЖТ
   729тЖТ```typescript
   730тЖТinterface ServiceDemand {
   731тЖТ  id: string;
   732тЖТ  fleetId: string;
   733тЖТ  effectiveDate: Date;
   734тЖТ  dayType: 'WEEKDAY' | 'SATURDAY' | 'SUNDAY' | 'HOLIDAY';
   735тЖТ  
   736тЖТ  minTrainsRequired: number;
   737тЖТ  peakAmRequirement?: number;
   738тЖТ  middayRequirement?: number;
   739тЖТ  peakPmRequirement?: number;
   740тЖТ  standbyBuffer: number;
   741тЖТ}
   742тЖТ
   743тЖТinterface AvailabilityValidation {
   744тЖТ  isValid: boolean;
   745тЖТ  availableTrains: number;
   746тЖТ  requiredTrains: number;
   747тЖТ  shortfall: number;
   748тЖТ  unavailableTrains: string[];  // Train IDs
   749тЖТ  trainsInMaintenance: string[]; // Train IDs
   750тЖТ}
   751тЖТ
   752тЖТclass ServiceDemandService {
   753тЖТ  constructor(
   754тЖТ    private db: Database,
   755тЖТ    private unavailabilityService: UnavailabilityService
   756тЖТ  ) {}
   757тЖТ  
   758тЖТ  /**
   759тЖТ   * Get service demand for a specific date
   760тЖТ   */
   761тЖТ  async getDemand(fleetId: string, targetDate: Date): Promise<ServiceDemand> {
   762тЖТ    const dayType = this.getDayType(targetDate);
   763тЖТ    
   764тЖТ    const demand = await this.db
   765тЖТ      .select()
   766тЖТ      .from(serviceDemand)
   767тЖТ      .where(and(
   768тЖТ        eq(serviceDemand.fleetId, fleetId),
   769тЖТ        eq(serviceDemand.dayType, dayType),
   770тЖТ        lte(serviceDemand.effectiveDate, targetDate)
   771тЖТ      ))
   772тЖТ      .orderBy(desc(serviceDemand.effectiveDate))
   773тЖТ      .limit(1);
   774тЖТ    
   775тЖТ    if (demand.length === 0) {
   776тЖТ      // Return default: 85% of fleet
   777тЖТ      const fleetSize = await this.getFleetSize(fleetId);
   778тЖТ      return {
   779тЖТ        id: 'default',
   780тЖТ        fleetId,

## 4.2 Ingestion Service

### 4.2.1 Purpose

Process daily CSV files containing mileage data, validate records, handle meter events, and update the database.

### 4.2.2 File Watcher

```typescript
interface FileWatcherConfig {
  inboxPath: string;           // /data/inbox
  processedPath: string;       // /data/processed
  quarantinePath: string;      // /data/quarantine
  expectedFilePattern: RegExp; // /^mileage_\d{8}\.csv$/
  maxFileSizeBytes: number;    // 10MB
  alertThresholdHours: number; // 2
}

class FileWatcherService {
  private watcher: FSWatcher;
  private lastFileReceivedAt: Date | null = null;
  
  async start(): Promise<void> {
    this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.config.inboxPath, {
      persistent: true,
      awaitWriteFinish: { stabilityThreshold: 2000, pollInterval: 500 }
    });
    
    this.watcher.on('add', async (filePath) => {
      this.lastFileReceivedAt = new Date();
      await this.processFile(filePath);
    });
    
    // Health check interval
    setInterval(() => this.checkFileArrivalHealth(), 30 * 60 * 1000);
  }
  
  private async processFile(filePath: string): Promise<void> {
    const filename = path.basename(filePath);
    const jobId = crypto.randomUUID();
    
    try {
      // Validate file
      await this.validateFile(filePath);
      
      // Queue for processing
      await this.jobQueue.add('ingestion', {
        jobId,
        filePath,
        filename,
        receivedAt: new Date().toISOString()
      }, {
        attempts: 3,
        backoff: { type: 'exponential', delay: 5000 }
      });
      
      this.logger.info({ jobId, filename }, 'File queued for ingestion');
      
    } catch (error) {
      // Move to quarantine
      const quarantinePath = path.join(
        this.config.quarantinePath, 
        `${Date.now()}_${filename}`
      );
      await fs.rename(filePath, quarantinePath);
      
      this.logger.error({ filename, error }, 'File quarantined');
      
      await this.alertService.send({
        type: 'FILE_VALIDATION_FAILED',
        severity: 'WARNING',
        message: `File ${filename} failed validation: ${error.message}`,
        filePath: quarantinePath
      });
    }
  }
  
  private async validateFile(filePath: string): Promise<void> {
    const stats = await fs.stat(filePath);
    
    // Size check
    if (stats.size > this.config.maxFileSizeBytes) {
      throw new Error(`File exceeds maximum size: ${stats.size} bytes`);
    }
    
    // Format check
    const filename = path.basename(filePath);
    if (!this.config.expectedFilePattern.test(filename)) {
      throw new Error(`Filename does not match expected pattern: ${filename}`);
    }
    
    // Content check (first 10 lines)
    const sample = await this.readFirstLines(filePath, 10);
    await this.validateCSVStructure(sample);
  }
  
  private async checkFileArrivalHealth(): Promise<void> {
    if (!this.lastFileReceivedAt) return;
    
    const hoursSinceLastFile = 
      (Date.now() - this.lastFileReceivedAt.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
    
    if (hoursSinceLastFile > this.config.alertThresholdHours) {
      await this.alertService.send({
        type: 'FILE_ARRIVAL_DELAYED',
        severity: 'WARNING',
        message: `No mileage files received in ${hoursSinceLastFile.toFixed(1)} hours`,
        lastFileAt: this.lastFileReceivedAt.toISOString(),
        expectedInterval: `${this.config.alertThresholdHours} hours`
      });
    }
  }
}
```

### 4.2.3 Ingestion Worker

```typescript
interface MileageRecord {
  trainNumber: string;
  readingDate: string;  // YYYY-MM-DD
  odometerValue: number;
  source?: string;
}

interface IngestionResult {
  jobId: string;
  filename: string;
  totalRecords: number;
  validRecords: number;
  invalidRecords: number;
  anomalies: AnomalyRecord[];
  meterEvents: MeterEventRecord[];
  processingTimeMs: number;
}

class IngestionWorker {
  async process(job: Job<IngestionJobData>): Promise<IngestionResult> {
    const startTime = Date.now();
    const { jobId, filePath, filename } = job.data;
    
    const result: IngestionResult = {
      jobId,
      filename,
      totalRecords: 0,
      validRecords: 0,
      invalidRecords: 0,
      anomalies: [],
      meterEvents: [],
      processingTimeMs: 0
    };
    
    // Parse CSV
    const records = await this.parseCSV(filePath);
    result.totalRecords = records.length;
    
    // Process in batches
    const batches = this.chunk(records, 100);
    
    for (const batch of batches) {
      await this.db.transaction(async (tx) => {
        for (const record of batch) {
          try {
            await this.processRecord(tx, record, result);
            result.validRecords++;
          } catch (error) {
            result.invalidRecords++;
            this.logger.warn({ record, error }, 'Record processing failed');
          }
        }
      });
    }
    
    // Move file to processed
    const processedPath = path.join(
      this.config.processedPath,
      `${Date.now()}_${filename}`
    );
    await fs.rename(filePath, processedPath);
    
    // Update train current mileage
    await this.updateTrainMileage(records);
    
    // Trigger downstream processing
    await this.triggerDriftCheck();
    
    result.processingTimeMs = Date.now() - startTime;
    
    return result;
  }
  
  private async processRecord(
    tx: Transaction,
    record: MileageRecord,
    result: IngestionResult
  ): Promise<void> {
    // Find train
    const train = await tx.query.trains.findFirst({
      where: eq(trains.trainNumber, record.trainNumber)
    });
    
    if (!train) {
      throw new Error(`Unknown train: ${record.trainNumber}`);
    }
    
    // Get previous reading
    const previousReading = await tx.query.mileageReadings.findFirst({
      where: and(
        eq(mileageReadings.trainId, train.id),
        lt(mileageReadings.readingDate, record.readingDate)
      ),
      orderBy: desc(mileageReadings.readingDate)
    });
    
    // Calculate adjusted value (handle meter events)
    const adjustment = await this.getMeterAdjustment(tx, train.id, record.readingDate);
    const adjustedReading = record.odometerValue + adjustment;
    
    // Calculate daily km
    let dailyKm: number | null = null;
    let anomalyType: string | null = null;
    
    if (previousReading) {
      dailyKm = adjustedReading - previousReading.adjustedReading;
      
      // Anomaly detection
      if (dailyKm < 0) {
        anomalyType = 'NEGATIVE';
        result.anomalies.push({
          trainNumber: record.trainNumber,
          date: record.readingDate,
          type: 'NEGATIVE',
          value: dailyKm,
          message: `Negative daily mileage: ${dailyKm} km`
        });
      } else if (dailyKm > 1000) {  // Spike threshold
        anomalyType = 'SPIKE';
        result.anomalies.push({
          trainNumber: record.trainNumber,
          date: record.readingDate,
          type: 'SPIKE',
          value: dailyKm,
          message: `Unusually high daily mileage: ${dailyKm} km`
        });
      }
    }
    
    // Insert or update reading
    await tx.insert(mileageReadings)
      .values({
        trainId: train.id,
        readingDate: record.readingDate,
        rawReading: record.odometerValue,
        adjustedReading,
        dailyKm,
        validationStatus: anomalyType ? 'ANOMALY' : 'VALID',
        anomalyType,
        sourceFile: result.filename
      })
      .onConflictDoUpdate({
        target: [mileageReadings.trainId, mileageReadings.readingDate],
        set: {
          rawReading: record.odometerValue,
          adjustedReading,
          dailyKm,
          validationStatus: anomalyType ? 'ANOMALY' : 'VALID',
          anomalyType,
          sourceFile: result.filename
        }
      });
  }
  
  private async getMeterAdjustment(
    tx: Transaction,
    trainId: string,
    asOfDate: string
  ): Promise<number> {
    // Sum all meter event adjustments up to this date
    const events = await tx.query.meterEvents.findMany({
      where: and(
        eq(meterEvents.trainId, trainId),
        lte(meterEvents.eventDate, asOfDate)
      )
    });
    
    return events.reduce((sum, e) => sum + (e.adjustmentKm || 0), 0);
  }
  
  private async updateTrainMileage(records: MileageRecord[]): Promise<void> {
    // Group by train, find latest reading
    const latestByTrain = new Map<string, MileageRecord>();
    
    for (const record of records) {
      const existing = latestByTrain.get(record.trainNumber);
      if (!existing || record.readingDate > existing.readingDate) {
        latestByTrain.set(record.trainNumber, record);
      }
    }
    
    // Update train current_mileage
    for (const [trainNumber, record] of latestByTrain) {
      await this.db.update(trains)
        .set({ 
          currentMileageKm: record.odometerValue,
          updatedAt: new Date()
        })
        .where(eq(trains.trainNumber, trainNumber));
    }
    
    // Update fleet mileage targets
    await this.db.execute(sql`SELECT update_fleet_mileage_targets()`);
  }
}
```
